originalTitle: Where to preorder Grand Theft Auto VI
summary: Rockstar's long-awaited Grand Theft Auto VI is launching November 19th, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series S/X consoles. The game will be available digitally at launch, with physical cases containing codes, not discs, so your options for preordering are straightforward. The preloading phase for the game begins on November 12th, which should give you […]
content: Rockstar’s long-awaited Grand Theft Auto VI is launching November 19th, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series S/X consoles. The game will be available digitally at launch, with physical cases containing codes, not discs, so your options for preordering are straightforward. The preloading phase for the game begins on November 12th, which should give you plenty of time to install the game. There are two versions of the game to choose from, the $79.99 Standard and $99.99 Ultimate editions. Both include the same preorder perks. You’ll get the Vintage Vice City Pack when the game launches. It’s a set of in-game items that includes vehicles, weapon patterns, and hairstyles with nods to Grand Theft Auto: Vice City. You’ll also get a free month of GTA Plus that you can redeem immediately if you preorder the game digitally. It’s membership for Grand Theft Auto V’s online mode that grants in-game perks and access to a rotating selection of classic Rockstar games. It normally costs $7.99 per month. The standard version is available to preorder digitally from PlayStation and Xbox, or as a code in a box from Rockstar and major retailers like Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy. [Product: Grand Theft Auto VI - Standard Edition | https://www.amazon.com/Grand-Theft-Auto-VI-PlayStation-Code/dp/B0H6K928WL?tag=theverge02-20, https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/EP1004-PPSA01547_00-GTAVISTANDARD001/, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.xbox.com%2Fen-US%2Fgames%2Fstore%2Fgrand-theft-auto-vi%2F9P3H4968GRSM%2F0017%2F9PWFKCT9JGKL] The $99.99 GTA VI Ultimate Edition includes a surprising amount of content not available in the Standard version that we’ve listed below in detail. There are cars and other vehicles, special weapon variants, outfits, extra customization options, shops, and cosmetic services included in the Ultimate Edition that aren’t accessible in the game otherwise. It’s only available digitally from PlayStation or Xbox. [Product: Grand Theft Auto VI - Ultimate Edition | https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/EP1004-PPSA01547_00-GTAVIULTIMATE001/, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.xbox.com%2Fen-US%2Fgames%2Fstore%2Fgrand-theft-auto-vi-ultimate-edition%2F9NNZSNHLR63L%2F0017%2F9W0CVZDS9RZF] Here’s everything you get with the Ultimate Edition: * Vehicle - ‘95 Grotti Cheetah * Weapons - Hawk and Little Morgan Revolvers * Weapons - Personalized Weapon Variants * Looks - Vice City Style * Vehicle - Jason’s Safehouse Vehicles * Modkit - Ganado Retro Build * Mod Shop - Rideout Customs * Hair Salon - Sara’s Unisex Salon * Watercraft - Shitzu Squalo * Clothing Store - Stock 305 * Vehicle and Garage - ‘67 Vapid Dominator Buggy * Tattoo Shop - Electric Fang Tattoo * Mod Shop - One-Eyed Willie’s * Looks - Goodtime Gear * Gang Compound - PTT Youngin$ Illegal Good Store * Special Commission - Classic Car Collection
chineseTitle: 哪里可以预订 Grand Theft Auto VI
chineseSummary: Rockstar 期待已久的 Grand Theft Auto VI 将于 2026 年 11 月 19 日在 PlayStation 5 和 Xbox Series S/X 游戏机上推出。该游戏在发布时将以数字形式提供，实体盒中包含代码，而不是光盘，因此您的预订选项非常简单。游戏的预加载阶段将于 11 月 12 日开始，这将为您提供 [...]
chineseContent: Rockstar 期待已久的 Grand Theft Auto VI 将于 2026 年 11 月 19 日在 PlayStation 5 和 Xbox Series S/X 游戏机上推出。该游戏在发布时将以数字形式提供，实体盒中包含代码，而不是光盘，因此您的预订选项非常简单。游戏的预加载阶段将于 11 月 12 日开始，这将为您提供充足的时间来安装游戏。该游戏有两个版本可供选择：79.99 美元的标准版和 99.99 美元的终极版。两者都包含相同的预购福利。游戏启动时，您将获得复古罪恶都市包。这是一组游戏内物品，包括车辆、武器图案和发型，向《侠盗猎车手：罪恶都市》致敬。如果您以数字方式预订游戏，您还将获得一个月的免费 G​​TA Plus，可以立即兑换。它是 Grand Theft Auto V 在线模式的会员，可提供游戏内福利并轮流选择经典 Rockstar 游戏。通常每月费用为 7.99 美元。标准版本可从 PlayStation 和 Xbox 进行数字预订，也可以通过 Rockstar 以及亚马逊、沃尔玛和百思买等主要零售商的包装盒中的代码进行预订。 [产品：侠盗猎车手 VI - 标准版 | https://www.amazon.com/Grand-Theft-Auto-VI-PlayStation-Code/dp/B0H6K928WL?tag=theverge02-20，https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/EP1004-PPSA01547_00-GTAVISTANDARD001/， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.xbox.com%2Fen-US%2Fgames%2Fstore%2Fgrand-theft-auto-vi%2F9P3H4968GRSM%2F0017%2F9PWFKCT9JGKL] 99.99 美元GTA VI 终极版包含标准版中没有的大量内容，我们在下面详细列出。有汽车和其他车辆、特殊武器变体、服装、额外定制
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
